meta.title: Villain Origin Test | DopaBrain
meta.description: Discover your villain origin story! 16 rapid-fire binary choices reveal which villain archetype you truly are.

app.title: Villain Origin Test
app.subtitle: What made you the villain?
app.description: 16 rapid-fire binary choices. No thinking, just instinct. Tap left or right to reveal your villain origin story.

betrayed.name: The Betrayed
betrayed.narrative: You were forged in the fires of broken trust. Someone you loved turned their back on you, and the wound never healed. Now you walk through the world with walls so high nobody can reach you. Your pain is your armor, and your memory is your weapon.

mastermind.name: The Mastermind
mastermind.narrative: While others acted on impulse, you learned to think ten steps ahead. Every move is calculated, every word is deliberate. You don't need brute force when you can dismantle someone's entire world with a single phone call. The chessboard is your kingdom.

anarchist.name: The Anarchist
anarchist.narrative: Rules were written by the powerful to keep the powerless in check. You saw through the illusion early. Now you tear down every system, every institution, every comfortable lie. Some call it destruction. You call it liberation.

fallenHero.name: The Fallen Hero
fallenHero.narrative: You started with noble intentions. You wanted to save the world, protect the innocent, be the good one. But the world kept taking and taking until there was nothing left of who you used to be. The hero died. Something darker took its place.

phantom.name: The Phantom
phantom.narrative: You exist in the shadows, unseen and unknown. By the time they realize you were there, it's already too late. You've mastered the art of invisibility, pulling strings from the darkness. No one fears what they can't see — until they do.

conqueror.name: The Conqueror
conqueror.narrative: Power isn't something you want — it's something you are. You were born to command, to dominate, to rule. Every room you enter becomes your throne room. Weakness disgusts you. The world doesn't need saving. It needs a stronger hand.

result.percentileStat: Only {percent}% of players got the same villain origin

share.title: Share Your Origin
share.text: My villain origin is "{archetype}"! What made you the villain?
